title: Dove India South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Dove India South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dove India South Asia Partners! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dove India South Asia Partners:
Dove India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dove India South Asia Partners!
